title: Rapid Detection of SARS-CoV-2 Using CRISPR Diagnostics
author: Mammoth Biosciences
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfhcjj2w
materials: Extract patient RNA following CDC recommendations .

steps.title: Prepare LbCas12a RNP complexes for the samples to be tested
steps.instruction: Prepare LbCas12a RNP complexes for the samples to be tested. One complex for N-gene, E-gene, and RNase P gRNAs is needed for each sample . %s %s

steps.title: Incubate LbCas12a with gRNA to generate...
steps.instruction: Incubate LbCas12a with gRNA to generate RNP complexes for 00:30:00 at 37 °C .

steps.title: Add reporter substrate to final concentration of 500 nanomolar (nM)
steps.instruction: Add reporter substrate to final concentration of 500 nanomolar (nM) .

steps.title: Place reactions On ice until ready to proceed
steps.instruction: Place reactions On ice until ready to proceed. Complexes are stable at 4°C for at least 24 hours.

steps.title: On ice , prepare three RT-LAMP...
steps.instruction: On ice , prepare three RT-LAMP reactions , one each for N-gene, E-gene, and RNase P primer sets: %s %s

steps.title: Incubate at 62 °C for 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 62 °C for 00:30:00 . Note: Use precaution when opening amplification tubes to prevent amplicon contamination.

steps.title: Combine 2 µL of the RT-LAMP...
steps.instruction: Combine 2 µL of the RT-LAMP reaction with 18 µL of the LbCas12a RNP complex with the appropriate gRNA.

steps.title: Insert Milenia HybriDetect 1 (TwistDx) lateral...
steps.instruction: Insert Milenia HybriDetect 1 (TwistDx) lateral flow strip directly into reaction.

steps.title: Allow the lateral flow strip to...
steps.instruction: Allow the lateral flow strip to run for 00:02:00 at Room temperature and observe the result.

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: The line closest to the sample pad is the control line and the line that appears farthest from the sample pad is the test line (see Figure 1). A sample with complete cleavage of the reporter molecule may appear to have no signal at the control line. %s %s
